---
title: "4893w"
author: "Soochun An"
date: "2025-10-27"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(isotree)
library(ggplot2)
library(glmnet)
library(e1071) 



df <- read_csv("C:/Users/asd05/Desktop/Stat 4893w/Complete.csv")
colSums(is.na(df))
df <- na.omit(df)
sum(is.na(df))
dim(df)        

features <- c("avg_val_sent", "avg_val_received", "total_Ether_sent", "total_ether_received", "total_ether_balance", "Sent_tnx", "Received_Tnx", "total_transactions_(including_tnx_to_create_contract)", "Unique_Sent_To_Addresses", "Unique_Received_From_Addresses") 

ID <- "Address" 

real_df <- df[, c(ID, features)]
X <- as.data.frame(real_df[, features])
X[] <- lapply(X, as.numeric)

X_scaled <- scale(X)
center_vec <- attr(X_scaled, "scaled:center")
scale_vec  <- attr(X_scaled,  "scaled:scale")

#ISOTREE
set.seed(4052)
model <- isolation.forest(X_scaled, ntrees = 300)

scores <- predict(model, X_scaled, type = "score")

diff_scores <- diff(scores)
which.max(diff_scores)

contam <- 0.02
thr <- quantile(scores, 1 - contam, na.rm = TRUE)
anomaly_flag <- as.numeric(scores) >= thr

result <- real_df %>%
  mutate(if_score = as.numeric(scores),
         anomaly = anomaly_flag)

outliers <- result %>% filter(anomaly)
cleaned  <- result %>% filter(!anomaly)

outliers <- result %>%
  filter(anomaly) %>%
  arrange(desc(if_score))

print(outliers)
table(result$anomaly)

correlation <- sapply(result[, features], function(x) cor(x, result$if_score, use = "complete.obs"))
correlation_df <- data.frame(Variable = names(correlation), Correlation = correlation)
correlation_df <- correlation_df[order(-abs(correlation_df$Correlation)), ]

print(correlation_df)

ggplot(result, aes(x = log10(total_Ether_sent + 1),
                   y = log10(total_ether_received + 1),
                   color = anomaly)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "grey70", "TRUE" = "red")) +
  labs(
    title = "Isolation Forest Outlier Detection (Log Scale)",
    subtitle = "Axes are log10-transformed for better visualization",
    x = "log10(Total Ether Sent + 1)",
    y = "log10(Total Ether Received + 1)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

score_sorted <- sort(scores)

plot(score_sorted,
     type = "l",
     main = "Sorted anomaly scores",
     xlab = "Index (sorted accounts)",
     ylab = "Anomaly score")


#Z score
z_scores <- as.data.frame(abs(X_scaled))
z_outlier_flag <- apply(z_scores > 3, 1, any)

result_z <- real_df %>%
  mutate(z_anomaly = z_outlier_flag)
table(result_z$z_anomaly)

max_z <- apply(z_scores, 1, max)

hist(
  max_z,
  breaks = 50,
  col = "gray80",
  border = "white",
  main = "Maximum Absolute Z-score per Account",
  xlab = "Max |Z|",
  xlim = c(0, 8) 
)

abline(v = 3, col = "red", lwd = 2)

col_outlier_count <- colSums(z_scores > 3)
col_outlier_count

#IQR
iqr_outlier_flag <- apply(X, 1, function(row) {
  any(sapply(seq_along(row), function(i) {
    Q1 <- quantile(X[, i], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
    Q3 <- quantile(X[, i], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
    IQR_val <- Q3 - Q1
    (row[i] < (Q1 - 1.5 * IQR_val)) || (row[i] > (Q3 + 1.5 * IQR_val))
  }))
})

result_iqr <- real_df %>%
  mutate(iqr_anomaly = iqr_outlier_flag)
table(result_iqr$iqr_anomaly)

X_scaled_for_iqr <- scale(X)

barplot(table(result_iqr$iqr_anomaly),
        main="IQR Outlier Classification",
        ylab="Number of Accounts",
        col=c("gray70","red"))
col_iqr_outliers <- apply(X, 2, function(v) {
    Q1 <- quantile(v, .25)
    Q3 <- quantile(v, .75)
    I <- Q3 - Q1
    sum(v < (Q1 - 1.5*I) | v > (Q3 + 1.5*I))
})
col_iqr_outliers

#LASSO
target <- "total_Ether_sent"

lasso_features <- setdiff(features, target)

X_lasso <- as.matrix(real_df[, lasso_features])
y_lasso <- real_df[[target]]

set.seed(4052)
cv_fit <- cv.glmnet( x = X_lasso, y = y_lasso, alpha = 1,nfolds = 5)
y_pred <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fit, X_lasso, s = "lambda.min"))

resid <- abs(y_lasso - y_pred)

lasso_contam <- 0.02
thr_resid <- quantile(resid, 1 - lasso_contam, na.rm = TRUE)

lasso_flag <- resid > thr_resid

table(lasso_flag) 

result_lasso <- real_df %>%
  mutate(
    lasso_pred   = y_pred,
    lasso_resid  = resid,
    lasso_anom   = lasso_flag
  )

lasso_outliers <- result_lasso %>% filter(lasso_anom)
head(lasso_outliers[, c("Address", target, "lasso_pred", "lasso_resid")])

coef_table <- coef(cv_fit, s = "lambda.min")
print(coef_table)

qqnorm(result_lasso$lasso_resid)
qqline(result_lasso$lasso_resid, col="red")

```
